item.title: ‘That's When the Boos Started’: The Oscars Speech That Lost the Room
item.description: Days after the 2003 invasion of Iraq, Michael Moore used his moment in the spotlight to rail against the war. Here’s what he and others onstage remember.

item.title: Can I Stare at My Girlfriend?
item.description: A ruling on the line between creepy and sweet.

item.title: When a President Gets Addicted to Regime Change
item.description: Venezuela gave Trump a taste of success. This isn’t the first time an American president has gotten hooked on overthrowing foreign governments.

item.title: How Tragedy, Wealth and Trump Shaped JB Pritzker
item.description: The governor of Illinois and Trump antagonist has become a national figure for Democrats. Where will that lead?

item.title: My Sex Addiction Nearly Wrecked Our Marriage. Do We Have to Tell the Kids?
item.description: My wife worries that withholding such a significant fact becomes an ongoing deception that could undermine trust.

item.title: My Mother’s Dying Wish Took Me on a Trip I’ll Never Forget
item.description: What I thought was a burden was a tether across death’s divide.

item.title: I’ve Spent Years Exploring the Grand Canyon. A Fire Revealed Something New.
item.description: A devastating wildfire forever changed the rare beauty of the secluded North Rim.

item.title: How Escape Rooms Helped Me Escape My Life
item.description: They allowed me to glimpse a future version of myself in a reality different than my own — one that might actually be OK.

item.title: My Friend’s Husband Is a Tax Deadbeat. Should I Tell the I.R.S.?
item.description: I am troubled that this man, a public-school teacher, has been avoiding something I consider to be a civic duty.

item.title: I’m the Family Breadwinner. Do I Have to Fund My Wife’s Bad Habit?
item.description: I have never said no to something she has asked for, and this is creating a division between us.

item.title: ‘I Am the News’: The Absurd Drama (and High Stakes) of the Don Lemon Affair
item.description: A Minnesota church protest made the former anchor a star again — and a target for the Trump administration.

item.title: Takeaways From The Times’s Inside Look at the C.D.C.
item.description: Many current and former employees say the actions of Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. are undermining the agency’s role in safeguarding public health.

item.title: Yes, Improv Comedy Sucks. And Everyone Should Try It.
item.description: What better way to get over my decision paralysis than squaring off with the unknown for three hours a week?

item.title: ‘A Mass Disaster Nonstop’: Inside the Turmoil at Robert F. Kennedy Jr.’s C.D.C.
item.description: Forty-three current and former C.D.C. employees on the changes they say are replacing science with ideology — and making Americans more vulnerable.
